title: Reed Unbound: The Joel M Reed Story
original_title: Reed Unbound: The Joel M Reed Story
overview: Independent Filmmakers Jerry Landi and Adrian Esposito explore the life and films of filmmaker Joel M Reed who gained a cult following with his film Bloodsucking Freaks.
